Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. CERN to host a new phase of Open Research Europe 188 upvotes, 16 comments
  2. Order Granting Preliminary Injunction – Anthropic vs. U.S. Department of War [pdf] 70 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. OpenTelemetry profiles enters public alpha 144 upvotes, 16 comments
  4. Whistler: Live eBPF Programming from the Common Lisp REPL 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025) 557 upvotes, 111 comments
  6. How much precision can you squeeze out of a table? 40 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. Show HN: Veil – Dark mode PDFs without destroying images, runs in the browser 33 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. Show HN: Fio: 3D World editor/game engine – inspired by Radiant and Hammer 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  9. Show HN: Turbolite – a SQLite VFS serving sub-250ms cold JOIN queries from S3 104 upvotes, 24 comments
  10. DeployTarot.com – Tarot card reading for deployments 164 upvotes, 42 comments
  11. From zero to a RAG system: successes and failures 284 upvotes, 87 comments
  12. $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks 39 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 856 upvotes, 299 comments
  14. John Bradley, author of xv, has died 207 upvotes, 63 comments
  15. My home network observes bedtime with OpenBSD and pf 118 upvotes, 33 comments
  16. Stripe Projects: Provision and manage services from the CLI 103 upvotes, 28 comments
  17. DOOM Over DNS 205 upvotes, 64 comments
  18. Judge blocks Pentagon effort to 'punish' Anthropic with supply chain risk label 101 upvotes, 31 comments
  19. Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer 59 upvotes, 17 comments
  20. My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack 285 upvotes, 123 comments
  21. Fast regex search: indexing text for agent tools 26 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Moving from GitHub to Codeberg, for lazy people 508 upvotes, 253 comments
  23. HyperAgents: Self-referential self-improving agents 127 upvotes, 56 comments
  24. What Does a Hologram Trademark Signify When the Hologram Isn't There? 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. We haven't seen the worst of what gambling and prediction markets will do 532 upvotes, 374 comments
  26. Using FireWire on a Raspberry Pi 49 upvotes, 26 comments
  27. Chicago artist creates tourism posters for city's neighborhoods 26 upvotes, 13 comments
  28. Anthropic Subprocessor Changes 29 upvotes, 18 comments
  29. Apple discontinues the Mac Pro with no plans for future hardware 49 upvotes, 39 comments
  30. Olympic Committee bars transgender athletes from women’s events 243 upvotes, 554 comments

Last generated 9:00am, 27 March 2026. Source here.
